## Meeting Purpose

[Screening call for the Community Lead role at GrowthX.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Role:** GrowthX seeks a Community Lead to grow its paid community (currently 70 members). The role's success is measured by member growth, not agency pipeline, as the community is a standalone product.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)
  - [**The Challenge:** The community lacks a clear value proposition and a product anchor. Its current funnel (workshops → recordings → paywall) is effective but ad-hoc and unscalable.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [**The Candidate:** Dani Hao, Community Lead at Apollo.io, presented a framework for building a community flywheel by integrating it with marketing, demand gen, and customer advocacy.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**The Strategy:** GrowthX will build a portfolio of offerings (community, products, lower-cost services) from its agency's proven methodology, leveraging its "do the work" credibility to create a competitive advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3176.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX: The Agency & The Community

  - [**Core Business:** GrowthX.ai is an agency building AI-native marketing systems.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**Traction:** Grew from $0 to $12–13M revenue in one year.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**Model:** Uses AI agents and human experts to own clients' content (SEO, AEO, social).](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [**Example:** For Webflow, GrowthX's "machine" publishes 30–40 articles weekly to build a developer resource.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Community Origin:** Grew organically from free workshops evangelizing GrowthX's methods.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [**Funnel:** Workshops (500–1,000 attendees) → Recordings posted in the community → Paywall.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Status:** 70 paying members; currently a "side project" managed by Jason Gong.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### The Community's Core Challenge

  - [**Problem:** The community lacks a clear value proposition, making it hard to attract and retain members.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** No product anchor. Unlike Apollo.io, GrowthX's internal tools are not user-facing, and promoting competitors is not an option.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution (Dani Hao):** Anchor the community on GrowthX's proprietary methodology.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
      - [**Assets:** Create a library of playbooks, frameworks, and templates.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Allow members to submit and share their own playbooks.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

### Dani Hao's Background & Proposed Framework

  - [**Experience:** 7 years in community, customer marketing, and demand gen.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**Current Role:** Community Lead at Apollo.io.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**Scope:** Manages the entire community ecosystem (Slack, events, CABs, advocacy).](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)
      - [**Team:** 1 full-time manager (Dani), a social lead, and contractors (total \~7).](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=2005.0)
  - [**Proposed Framework: The Community Flywheel**](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [**Discovery Loops:** Drive volume via content integration and member testimonials.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [**Depth Loops:** Convert free users to paid members with exclusive features (e.g., office hours, mentorship).](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Engagement Loops:** Mix in-person events with online discussions led by members.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### GrowthX's Vision & Business Model

  - [**Community Goal:** A standalone revenue stream measured by member growth, not agency pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The agency is booked through January, so the community is a separate product.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=2988.0)
      - [**Aspiration:** Become a leading community like Reforged, Pavilion, or Exit 5.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3024.0)
  - [**Long-Term Strategy: Productize the Agency**](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3176.0)
      - [**Vision:** Converge services and software.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3201.0)
      - [**Path:** Start with high-value services ($200k+/year) → Productize the methodology into lower-cost tiers (e.g., $10k/year) and standalone products.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3280.0)
      - [**Advantage:** GrowthX's "do the work" credibility provides a strong brand foundation for product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason Gong:** Schedule a follow-up call with Dani Hao to discuss past work.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3571.0)
  - [**Jason Gong:** Send a 2–3 hour take-home assignment to Dani Hao.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3571.0)
  - [**Dani Hao:** Present the take-home assignment to Jason Gong and Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZB2neRcLYrt7YZzrjWwxcLMDvJyWzyY?tab=summary&timestamp=3571.0)
